message:
chore: Bump version to 3.1.0

Release v3.1.0 includes:

Features:
- Comprehensive UX overhaul with gum-styled help and progress indicators
- Repository renamed from 'get_icloud_image_link' to 'giil'
- New --quiet/-q flag for suppressing progress messages
- Branding update: "Get Image [from] Internet Link" (multi-platform)

Fixes:
- CI: Install exifr dependency for unit tests
- Tests: Wrap test suites in parent describe for proper async before() handling
- Platform-specific filename prefixes (icloud_, dropbox_, gphotos_, gdrive_)
- Add datetime extraction to Dropbox JSON output

Documentation:
- Complete branding update across all files
- Add SUPPORTED PLATFORMS section to help text
- Update examples to showcase all supported platforms

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
